THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINDOW CLEANERS UNION S.E.I.U LOCAL 44, AFL-CIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEVA ROBERT $183.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $241.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO ROBERT NIEVA RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
